retry_reason: Failure modes (e.g., -ENOMEM from alloc, -EBUSY from existing DLC) indicate permanent conditions; retrying the same operation would not succeed without external changes.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to create an RFCOMM device, involving user-space copy, permission checks, socket state validation, channel lookup, and device registration. The refcount operations (rfcomm_dlc_alloc/rfcomm_dlc_hold) are merely one step within this broader business logic.
judge.retry_reason: Failure modes (e.g., -ENOMEM from alloc, -EBUSY from existing DLC) indicate permanent conditions; retrying the same operation would not succeed without external changes.
